background_channel.name: background
background_channel.role: excluded from mAP per COCO convention

reconciliation.discrepancy_cause: 250-batch class-balanced subsample under-samples rare classes 5 (GT=18), 8 (GT=20), 13 (GT=57) — they appear zero-GT in D3 eval logs but are present in full set

mAP_implications.formula_for_intuition: 0.358 x 24 / 17 = 0.505 (but actual det_mAP50_pc ratio is ~1.60x not 24/17=1.41x)

wacv_convention.our_evaluate_py: AP=0 for zero-GT, included in 24-class mean → non-standard diluted version
wacv_convention.wacv_uses: Standard pycocotools → present-class mAP = our det_mAP50_pc
